description: Use the N/ui/serverWidget module to work with the user interface within NetSuite. You can use Suitelets to build custom pages and wizards that have a NetSuite look-and-feel.

methods.name: createAssistant
methods.description: Creates and returns a new assistant object.

params.name: options.hideNavBar
params.description: Whether to hide the navigation bar

methods.name: createForm
methods.description: Creates and returns a new form object.

params.name: options.hideNavBar
params.description: Whether to hide the navigation bar

methods.name: createList
methods.description: Creates a List object, specifying the title and whether to hide the navigation bar.

params.name: options.hideNavBar
params.description: Whether to hide the navigation bar

enums.name: AssistantSubmitAction
enums.description: Holds the string values for submit actions performed by the user.

members.name: JUMP
members.description: The user jumped to a step in a non-sequential assistant

enums.name: FieldBreakType
enums.description: Holds the string values for supported field break types.

enums.name: FieldDisplayType
enums.description: Holds the string values for supported field display types.

members.name: DISABLED
members.description: Prevents a user from changing the field

members.name: ENTRY
members.description: The sublist field appears as a data entry input field

members.name: HIDDEN
members.description: The field on the form is hidden

members.name: INLINE
members.description: The field appears as inline text

members.name: NODISPLAY
members.description: The field is not displayed but can be made visible by client script

members.name: NORMAL
members.description: The field appears as a normal input field

members.name: READONLY
members.description: The field is disabled but still selectable and scrollable

enums.name: FieldLayoutType
enums.description: Holds the string values for the supported types of field layouts.

members.name: ENDROW
members.description: The field appears last in a horizontally aligned field group

members.name: MIDROW
members.description: The field appears in the middle of a horizontally aligned field group

members.name: NORMAL
members.description: The field appears in its default position

members.name: OUTSIDE
members.description: The field appears outside the normal field layout area

members.name: OUTSIDEABOVE
members.description: The field appears above the normal field layout area

members.name: OUTSIDEBELOW
members.description: The field appears below the normal field layout area

members.name: STARTROW
members.description: The field appears first in a horizontally aligned field group

enums.name: FieldType
enums.description: Holds the values for supported field types.

enums.name: FormPageLinkType
enums.description: Holds the string values for supported page link types on a form.

members.name: BREADCRUMB
members.description: Link appears on the top-left corner after the system breadcrumbs

members.name: CROSSLINK
members.description: Link appears on the top-right corner

enums.name: LayoutJustification
enums.description: Holds the string values for supported justification layouts.

enums.name: ListStyle
enums.description: Holds the string values for supported list styles.

enums.name: SublistDisplayType
enums.description: Holds the string values for supported sublist display types.

enums.name: SublistType
enums.description: Holds the string values for valid sublist types.

members.name: EDITOR
members.description: Editor sublist with fields above the list

members.name: INLINEEDITOR
members.description: Inline editor sublist with a new line at the bottom

members.name: LIST
members.description: List sublist with a fixed number of lines

methods.name: addField
methods.description: Adds a field to the assistant.

params.name: options.source
params.description: The internal ID of a record type for sourcing select options

params.name: options.container
params.description: The field group to place the field in

methods.name: addFieldGroup
methods.description: Adds a field group to the assistant.

methods.name: addStep
methods.description: Adds a step to the assistant.

methods.name: addSublist
methods.description: Adds a sublist to the assistant.

methods.name: getField
methods.description: Gets a field object from the assistant.

methods.name: getFieldGroup
methods.description: Gets a field group object from the assistant.

methods.name: getFieldGroupIds
methods.description: Gets all the field group IDs in the assistant.

methods.name: getFieldIds
methods.description: Gets all the field IDs in the assistant.

methods.name: getFieldIdsByFieldGroup
methods.description: Gets all field IDs in the specified assistant field group.

params.name: fieldGroup
params.description: The internal ID of the field group

methods.name: getLastAction
methods.description: Gets the last action submitted by the user.

methods.name: getLastStep
methods.description: Gets the step that the last submitted action came from.

methods.name: getNextStep
methods.description: Gets the next step prompted by the assistant.

methods.name: getStep
methods.description: Returns a step in the assistant by ID.

methods.name: getStepCount
methods.description: Gets the total count of steps in the assistant.

methods.name: getSteps
methods.description: Gets all the steps in the assistant.

methods.name: getSublist
methods.description: Gets a sublist object from its ID.

methods.name: getSublistIds
methods.description: Gets all the sublist IDs in the assistant.

methods.name: hasErrorHtml
methods.description: Indicates whether the assistant has an error message to display.

methods.name: isFinished
methods.description: Indicates whether the assistant is finished.

methods.name: sendRedirect
methods.description: Manages redirects in the assistant.

methods.name: setSplash
methods.description: Defines a splash message for the assistant.

params.name: options.title
params.description: The title of the splash screen

params.name: options.text1
params.description: The text for the splash screen

params.name: options.text2
params.description: Additional text for the splash screen

methods.name: updateDefaultValues
methods.description: Sets the default values of fields that are specific to the assistant.

params.name: values
params.description: An object of field ID/value pairs

properties.name: clientScriptFileId
properties.description: The File Cabinet ID of the client script file to be used in this assistant.

properties.name: clientScriptModulePath
properties.description: The relative path to the client script file to be used in this assistant.

properties.name: currentStep
properties.description: The current step of the assistant.

properties.name: errorHtml
properties.description: The error message text for the assistant.

properties.name: finishedHtml
properties.description: The text displayed after the assistant is finished.

properties.name: hideAddToShortcutsLink
properties.description: Whether the Add to Shortcuts link is displayed in the UI.

properties.name: hideStepNumber
properties.description: Whether the current and total step numbers are displayed in the UI.

properties.name: isNotOrdered
properties.description: Whether assistant steps are ordered or unordered.

properties.name: title
properties.description: The title of the assistant.

objectTypes.name: AssistantStep
objectTypes.description: A step within a custom NetSuite assistant.

methods.name: getFieldIds
methods.description: Gets all the field IDs in the assistant step.

methods.name: getLineCount
methods.description: Gets the number of lines previously entered by a user in a step.

methods.name: getSubmittedSublistIds
methods.description: Gets the IDs for all the sublists submitted in a step.

methods.name: getSublistFieldIds
methods.description: Gets all the field IDs in a sublist within this step.

methods.name: getSublistValue
methods.description: Gets the current value of a sublist field in a step.

methods.name: getValue
methods.description: Returns the value of a field that was submitted in this step.

properties.name: helpText
properties.description: The help text for the step.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The internal ID of the step.

properties.name: label
properties.description: The label for the step.

properties.name: stepNumber
properties.description: Indicates where this step appears sequentially in the assistant.

objectTypes.name: Button
objectTypes.description: A button that appears in a UI object.

properties.name: isDisabled
properties.description: Whether the button is disabled (dimmed).

properties.name: isHidden
properties.description: Whether the button is hidden in the UI.

properties.name: label
properties.description: The label for the button.

objectTypes.name: Field
objectTypes.description: A NetSuite field on a Form or Sublist.

methods.name: addSelectOption
methods.description: Adds a select option to a dropdown list for a selectable field.

methods.name: getSelectOptions
methods.description: Returns the internal ID and label of the options for a select field as name/value pairs.

methods.name: setHelpText
methods.description: Sets the help text that appears in the field help popup.

methods.name: updateBreakType
methods.description: Updates the break type used to add a break in flow layout for the field.

methods.name: updateDisplaySize
methods.description: Updates the height and width for the field.

methods.name: updateDisplayType
methods.description: Updates the type of display for the field.

methods.name: updateLayoutType
methods.description: Updates the layout type for the field.

properties.name: alias
properties.description: The alias used to set the field value.

properties.name: defaultValue
properties.description: The default value for the field.

properties.name: helpText
properties.description: The help text for the field.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The internal ID of the field.

properties.name: isMandatory
properties.description: Whether the field is mandatory.

properties.name: label
properties.description: The label for the field.

properties.name: linkText
properties.description: The text displayed for a link in place of the URL.

properties.name: maxLength
properties.description: The maximum length, in characters, for the field.

properties.name: padding
properties.description: The number of empty vertical character spaces above the field.

properties.name: richTextHeight
properties.description: The height of a rich text field, in pixels.

properties.name: richTextWidth
properties.description: The width of a rich text field, in pixels.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The type of field.

objectTypes.name: FieldGroup
objectTypes.description: A field group on a Form.

properties.name: isBorderHidden
properties.description: Whether a border appears around the field group.

properties.name: isCollapsible
properties.description: Whether the field group is collapsible.

properties.name: isCollapsed
properties.description: Whether the field group is initially collapsed or expanded.

properties.name: isSingleColumn
properties.description: Whether the field group is displayed in a single column.

properties.name: label
properties.description: The label for the field group.

methods.name: addButton
methods.description: Adds a button to the form.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the button

params.name: options.label
params.description: The UI label for the button

params.name: options.functionName
params.description: The name of the function to call on click

methods.name: addCredentialField
methods.description: Adds a credential field to the form for invoking services provided by third parties.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the field

params.name: options.label
params.description: The UI label for the field

params.name: options.container
params.description: The tab or group to add the field to

methods.name: addField
methods.description: Adds a field to the form.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the field

params.name: options.label
params.description: The UI label for the field

params.name: options.source
params.description: The internal ID of a record type for sourcing select options

params.name: options.container
params.description: The tab or group to add the field to

methods.name: addFieldGroup
methods.description: Adds a group of fields to the form.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the group

params.name: options.label
params.description: The UI label for the group

params.name: options.tab
params.description: The tab to place the group in

methods.name: addPageInitMessage
methods.description: Shows a message on a form in view mode based on user event script context.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The message type: CONFIRMATION, INFORMATION, WARNING, ERROR

params.name: options.duration
params.description: Duration in ms before the message fades

methods.name: addPageLink
methods.description: Adds a link to a form.

methods.name: addResetButton
methods.description: Adds a Reset button to the form that clears the values of all fields.

params.name: options.label
params.description: The label for the reset button

methods.name: addSecretKeyField
methods.description: Adds a secret key field to the form.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the field

params.name: options.label
params.description: The UI label for the field

params.name: options.container
params.description: The tab or group to add the field to

methods.name: addSublist
methods.description: Adds a sublist to the form.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the sublist

params.name: options.label
params.description: The UI label for the sublist

params.name: options.tab
params.description: The tab to place the sublist in

methods.name: addSubmitButton
methods.description: Adds a submit button to the form that saves user inputs.

params.name: options.label
params.description: The label for the submit button

methods.name: addSubtab
methods.description: Adds a subtab to the form.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the subtab

params.name: options.label
params.description: The UI label for the subtab

params.name: options.tab
params.description: The parent tab to place the subtab in

methods.name: addTab
methods.description: Adds a tab to the form.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the tab

params.name: options.label
params.description: The UI label for the tab

methods.name: getButton
methods.description: Returns a button by internal ID.

methods.name: getField
methods.description: Returns a field by internal ID.

methods.name: getSublist
methods.description: Returns a sublist by internal ID.

methods.name: getSubtab
methods.description: Returns a subtab by internal ID.

methods.name: getTab
methods.description: Returns a tab object from its internal ID.

methods.name: getTabs
methods.description: Returns the internal IDs of all tabs on the form.

methods.name: insertField
methods.description: Inserts a field before another field within the form.

params.name: options.nextfield
params.description: The ID of the field to insert before

methods.name: insertSublist
methods.description: Inserts a sublist before another sublist on the form.

params.name: options.nextsublist
params.description: The ID of the sublist to insert before

methods.name: insertSubtab
methods.description: Inserts a subtab before another subtab on the form.

params.name: options.nextsubtab
params.description: The ID of the subtab to insert before

methods.name: insertTab
methods.description: Inserts a tab before another tab on the form.

params.name: options.nexttab
params.description: The ID of the tab to insert before

methods.name: removeButton
methods.description: Removes a button from the form.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The ID of the button to remove

methods.name: updateDefaultValues
methods.description: Sets the default values of many fields on the form.

params.name: options
params.description: An object of field ID/value pairs

properties.name: clientScriptFileId
properties.description: The File Cabinet ID of the client script file to be used in this form.

properties.name: clientScriptModulePath
properties.description: The relative path to the client script file to be used in this form.

properties.name: title
properties.description: The title used for the form.

objectTypes.name: List
objectTypes.description: A list page for displaying tabular data.

methods.name: addButton
methods.description: Adds a button to the list.

methods.name: addColumn
methods.description: Adds a column to the list.

methods.name: addEditColumn
methods.description: Adds a column containing Edit or Edit/View links to the list.

methods.name: addPageLink
methods.description: Adds a link to the list.

methods.name: addRow
methods.description: Adds a single row to the list.

params.name: options
params.description: An object of column ID/value pairs

methods.name: addRows
methods.description: Adds multiple rows to the list.

params.name: options.rows
params.description: Array of row objects (column ID/value pairs)

properties.name: clientScriptFileId
properties.description: The File Cabinet ID of the client script file to be used in this list.

properties.name: clientScriptModulePath
properties.description: The relative path to the client script file to be used in this list.

properties.name: style
properties.description: The display style for this list. Use the serverWidget.ListStyle enum.

properties.name: title
properties.description: The title of the list.

methods.name: addParamToURL
methods.description: Adds a URL parameter (optionally defined per row) to the list column's URL.

params.name: options.param
params.description: The name of the URL parameter

params.name: options.value
params.description: The value of the URL parameter

params.name: options.dynamic
params.description: Whether the parameter value is sourced from a column per row

methods.name: setURL
methods.description: Sets the base URL for the list column.

properties.name: label
properties.description: The label of this list column.

objectTypes.name: Sublist
objectTypes.description: A NetSuite sublist on a Form.

methods.name: addButton
methods.description: Adds a button to the sublist.

methods.name: addField
methods.description: Adds a field (column) to the sublist.

params.name: options.source
params.description: Record type for sourcing select options

methods.name: addMarkAllButtons
methods.description: Adds Mark All and Unmark All buttons to the sublist.

methods.name: addRefreshButton
methods.description: Adds a Refresh button to the sublist.

methods.name: getField
methods.description: Returns a Field object on the specified sublist.

methods.name: getSublistValue
methods.description: Gets a field value on a sublist.

methods.name: insertField
methods.description: Inserts a field before another field on a sublist.

params.name: options.nextfield
params.description: The ID of the field to insert before

methods.name: setSublistValue
methods.description: Sets the value of a sublist field.

methods.name: updateTotallingFieldId
methods.description: Updates the ID of a field designated as a totalling column for calculating and displaying a running total.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The field ID to designate as a totalling column

methods.name: updateUniqueFieldId
methods.description: Updates a field ID that is to have unique values across the rows in the sublist.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The field ID to designate as having unique values

properties.name: displayType
properties.description: The display style for the sublist. Use the serverWidget.SublistDisplayType enum.

properties.name: helpText
properties.description: The inline help text for the sublist.

properties.name: label
properties.description: The label for the sublist.

properties.name: lineCount
properties.description: The number of line items in the sublist.

properties.name: helpText
properties.description: The inline help text for the tab or subtab.

properties.name: label
properties.description: The label for the tab or subtab.
